description_long: This is a highly stylized police car with a retro-futuristic design, featuring a black and white body with bold, angular fins at the rear and numerous metallic tubes and mechanical components attached externally. The car's roof is equipped with a prominent red emergency light, and the sides display Chinese police markings in black text on a white background. The hood is adorned with additional mechanical devices and a splash of red paint or graphic, while the rear is fitted with more tubes, tanks, and yellow-red fin details. The wheels are classic, with chrome hubcaps, and the windows are dark, suggesting a reinforced or armored interior. The overall appearance is both functional and eccentric, blending traditional police car elements with imaginative, almost sci-fi modifications.
description: A retro-futuristic black and white police car with bold fins, external tubes, and prominent emergency lights, featuring Chinese police markings and mechanical embellishments.
description_view_0: Side view showing the black and white split body, Chinese police markings, large rear fins, and extensive tubing and mechanical parts on the hood and trunk.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the dual yellow-red fins, multiple exhaust tubes, and a dark trunk with a small emblem, with no visible license plate.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying similar mechanical features, police markings, and the full extent of the rear fins and tubing.
description_view_3: Front view emphasizing the red emergency light on the roof, complex tubing on the hood, and a splash of red paint or graphic detail.
attribute_police_markings: Chinese characters for 'police' (警察) and possibly a unit or department name are printed in black on the white section of the front doors. No other visible police-specific numbers, stripes, or checkers.
attribute_emergency_lights: A single, large, red dome-shaped emergency light is mounted centrally on the roof. No other visible emergency lights on the grille or rear.
